name: Vanessa Redgrave
abstract: Dame Vanessa Redgrave (born 30 January 1937) is an English actress and activist. In a career spanning over six decades, her accolades include an Academy Award, a Tony Award, two Primetime Emmy Awards, a Volpi Cup and an Olivier Award, making her one of the few performers to achieve the Triple Crown of Acting.
